div.h2: MIME Type Lookup — Extension Map & Default Fallback (file_server.c)

g.text: linear scan: N <= 16, fits in L1 cache
Index | Extension | MIME Type | Browser Action
Trigger: extension not in table OR no extension
Security: prevents browser from executing unknown
Never returns NULL - always valid MIME
WRONG text/html for .js -> renders as HTML
Missing charset= on text/* -> browser guesses
Never sniff bytes - use extension only
